title: 21:04 ГўВЂВ” January 29, 2021
body_text:
21:04 ГўВЂВ” January 29, 2021
CEBA Updates to Reporting Procedures
Export Development Canada (EDC) has changed the restrictions on reporting CEBA loan repayments. Based on this update, we revised the CEBA Program ГўВЂВ“ Repayment form in ServiceNow to allow reporting of loan repayments made outside a current reporting period.
Also, EDC has introduced a $2,500 fee floor for loan administration fees. Your financial institution will continue to report a calculated loan administration fee. If your calculated fee is less than the fee floor (e.g., $1,558.90), EDC will raise the threshold to $2,500. If your calculated fee is $2,500 or higher (e.g., $3,248.20), EDC will pay that amount.
We added the following frequently asked questions:
Q: How do I report a previous payment made outside of the current reporting period?
A: The Payment date can be selected for previous months; it is not limited to current reporting periods.
Q: How do I submit my quarterly admin fee report if I missed the reporting window?
A: Loan admin fee reporting is submitted to EDC on the 15th calendar day of each quarter. The loan admin fee can only be requested for the previous quarter. Central 1 is unable to process late reporting of loan admin fees.

Updated images and text to reflect that calculated fees can be edited while the fee report is in the ГўВЂВњCEBA Loan Administration Fee ГўВЂВ“ ReceivedГўВЂВќ category in My Company.

Added an explanation for the loan administration fee that EDC will pay out to your financial institution.

Added two new questions with responses for reporting late payments and the quarterly loan administration fees.
